ddls:
CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the campaign */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "expected_leads" INTEGER /* Expected number of leads for the campaign */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the campaign was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the campaign was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leads" (
  "lead_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lead */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign the lead belongs to */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the lead */,
  "sid" TEXT /* Session ID of the lead */,
  "lead_uuid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the lead */,
  "lead_type" TEXT /* Type of lead (e.g., new, follow-up) */,
  "lead_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the lead was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the lead was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lead_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leads_lead_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_source_id") REFERENCES lead_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leads_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lead_answers" (
  "answer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each answer */,
  "lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead the answer belongs to */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question being answered */,
  "answer" TEXT /* Answer to the question */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the answer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the answer was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("answer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lead_answers_lead_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_id") REFERENCES leads ("lead_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lead_answers_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of the question (e.g., text, multiple choice) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the question was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the question was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lead_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead the note belongs to */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the note was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the note was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lead_notes_lead_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_id") REFERENCES leads ("lead_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phone_numbers" (
  "phone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phone number */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number */,
  "phone_type" TEXT /* Type of the phone number (e.g., landline, mobile) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the phone number was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the phone number was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "caller_ids" (
  "caller_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each caller ID */,
  "caller_id_text" TEXT /* Text of the caller ID */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the caller ID was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the caller ID was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("caller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "call_recordings" (
  "recording_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recording */,
  "lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead the recording belongs to */,
  "recording_file" TEXT /* File path to the recording */,
  "recording_type" TEXT /* Type of the recording (e.g., audio, video) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recording was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recording was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recording_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_call_recordings_lead_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_id") REFERENCES leads ("lead_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "call_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead the log entry belongs to */,
  "call_date" TEXT /* Date of the call */,
  "call_duration" REAL /* Duration of the call */,
  "call_status" TEXT /* Status of the call (e.g., answered, missed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_call_logs_lead_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_id") REFERENCES leads ("lead_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales representative, team manager, administrator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission belongs to */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission (e.g., view leads, edit leads) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the member belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a member of the team */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team member (e.g., team lead, member) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team member was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team member was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the metric belongs to */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., conversion rate) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_performance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign the analytics belong to */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., click-through rate) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_analytics_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lead_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lead source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the lead source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the lead source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the lead source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the lead source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lead_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead the status belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the lead (e.g., new, in progress, closed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lead_status_lead_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_id") REFERENCES leads ("lead_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lead_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead the activity belongs to */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of the activity (e.g., email, phone call) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lead_activity_lead_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_id") REFERENCES leads ("lead_id")
)
